textPlain: While not related to the topic exactly, the blur under the translucent header was so distracting I had trouble reading the article. Usually I can overlook stuff like this; I can't explain why it bothered me so much.

Kinda off-topic but I love the quality of images used in this article. Even memes are HD. Quite rare as people tend to use whatever meme creator provides -  super-pixelated, low-quality source image with text slapped on top.
